items.a: MYBUBU is a comprehensive DeFi ecosystem on BSC featuring three interconnected smart contracts: MYBUBU Token (main utility), MYBUBU NFT Node (tiered dividend system), and MYMOMO Token (secondary token with burn mechanics). Together they create a sustainable reward and incentive system.

items.q: How does the LP mechanism work?
items.a: 70% of LP deposits are split into 35% Labubu + 35% BNB, paired automatically on PancakeSwap. 20% goes to referral/network rewards, and 10% to the Global Pool for Node Dividend holders.

items.q: What are the NFT Node tiers and rewards?
items.a: Each NFT Node costs 500 USDT and grants 10,000 MYBUBU tokens. Tokens are released at 10% per month over 10 months. For example, purchasing 10 Nodes gives you 100,000 MYBUBU tokens, claimable at 10,000 tokens per month.

items.q: How does the referral system work?
items.a: Multi-level referral rewards across 10 levels: Level 1 (1 invite) = 5%, Level 2 (3 invites) = 4%, Level 3 (5 invites) = 3%, Level 4 (7 invites) = 2%, Levels 5-10 (10 invites) = 1% each.
Max supply is 21,000,000 MYBUBU with 2% transfer tax and 5% team reserve. Each wallet can hold maximum 20,000 MYBUBU. 1% of each transaction goes to LP and 1% is burned for deflation protection.

items.q: How does the monthly token release work?
items.a: When you purchase NFT Nodes, your MYBUBU tokens are vested over 10 months. Each month, 10% of your total allocation is released and can be claimed. This ensures a sustainable and steady token distribution.

footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Cryptocurrency investments carry inherent risks. Please do your own research before participating. This is not financial advice. MyBubu is here for fun! 🐾

deposit.title: Deposit BNB for LP
deposit.subtitle: Deposit BNB to receive LP tokens • Min: 0.1 BNB • Max: 2 BNB
deposit.outOfRange: Amount must be between 0.1 and 2 BNB
deposit.smartDetected: Smart Account Detected — Tap for Info
deposit.smartIntro: The connected address is a contract wallet (Smart Account / AA wallet), not an EOA.
deposit.whyRevert1: The deposit contract binds LP positions and rewards to the sender. Smart accounts route calls through proxies, so accounting may not match your wallet.
deposit.whyRevert2: Many smart wallets do not accept BNB refunds via plain transfers, causing the receive/fallback to revert.
deposit.whyRevert3: Referral tracking is bound to EOA addresses; smart accounts will not accrue rewards correctly.
deposit.useEoa: How to use an EOA instead:
deposit.useEoa1: Use a standard EOA wallet such as TokenPocket, MetaMask, Trust Wallet, or Rabby.
deposit.useEoa2: Switch the network to BNB Smart Chain (BSC).
deposit.useEoa3: Transfer your BNB from the smart account to the new EOA address.
deposit.useEoa4: Disconnect the current wallet, then reconnect using the EOA.
deposit.tp1: Install TokenPocket from the App Store, Google Play, or tokenpocket.pro.
deposit.tp2: Open the app and tap "No Wallet Yet" → "Create Wallet".
deposit.tp3: Select BNB Smart Chain (BSC) as the network (do NOT pick "Smart Wallet" / "AA Wallet" — choose the standard wallet option).
deposit.tp4: Set a wallet name and password, then securely back up the 12-word seed phrase.
deposit.tp5: Confirm the seed phrase to finish creating your EOA address (starts with 0x...).
deposit.tp6: Send BNB to this new address, then connect it here via WalletConnect or the in-app DApp browser.
deposit.claimSubtitle: Your pending MYBUBU rewards from LP
